briefing_text:

reviews.author: UMD_Alumni_Fan
reviews.text: Been going here since 2019. Aarav is still there and still the fastest checkout on campus.

reviews.author: BudgetStudentEats
reviews.text: $14 for a gyro wrap seems steep vs Chipotle at $11 nearby. Worth it for the taste but the gap is growing.

reviews.author: StudyBreakSnacker
reviews.text: Sophia always remembers to ask if you want baklava with your order. Great upsell, great girl.

reviews.author: TerpFan2024
reviews.text: Best late-night spot near UMD. The gyro is massive and the staff is super fast after midnight.
